details.test: Task 1: Membership signup with amenities and review flow
Task 2: Book three high-rated group classes and verify schedule
Task 3: Book 5-session strength training package under $300
Task 4: Shop flow - 2 blue bottles and 1 additional item with in-club pickup
Task 5: Build 3-day evening class schedule with at least two cardio classes
Task 6: Reserve cheapest squash court next Wednesday 7-8 PM with guest
Task 7: Free trial request 7-day pass starting in 5 days
Task 8: Use childcare hours to book first class starting at least 30 minutes after opening
Task 9: Enroll in evening 6-week beginner running program under $200
